description: Unit tests for the Config class, including testing configuration merging, type checking, and default values, using Jasmine testing framework.

classes.name: DummyConfigClass
classes.description: A subclass of Config used for testing, with a static NAME property.

methods.name: static get NAME
methods.description: Returns the string 'dummy', used as the plugin name in tests.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges configuration objects with data attributes from DOM elements, handling defaults and precedence.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Checks the types of configuration options against expected types, throws TypeError if mismatched.
